description: Canonical Task 14 bias40 probe dataset contract. This probe widens only the bias window to [-40, 40] meV on a 241-point grid while keeping the Task 14 pairing representation and the currently accepted direction contract fixed for later manual server execution.

probe_scope.purpose: Probe wider-bias spectral behavior before later expanded nuisance-domain and TB-pilot tasks are promoted.

frozen_direction_contract.supported_spread_regime: narrow named-mode-centered spread only, half_width <= pi/32
frozen_direction_contract.diagnostic_raw_angles: excluded from this Task 14C probe contract

probe_transport_contract.barrier_z: hold current pre-14D structured sweep fixed during the bias40 probe
probe_transport_contract.gamma: hold current pre-14D structured sweep fixed during the bias40 probe
probe_transport_contract.temperature_kelvin: hold current pre-14D structured sweep fixed during the bias40 probe
